title: Counterattack
tmdbOverview: When a hostage rescue mission creates a new enemy, Capt. Guerrero and his elite soldiers must face an ambush by a criminal group.
synopsis: Counterattack (2025) is a action, adventure and thriller film in Spanish. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
